mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cafe_visit_sessions ( session_token, seat_no, guest_count, status, issued_at, expires_at, checkout_completed_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionToken}, #{seatNo}, #{guestCount}, #{status}, #{issuedAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{checkoutCompletedAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_token, seat_no, guest_count, status, issued_at, expires_at, checkout_completed_at, updated_at FROM cafe_visit_sessions WHERE session_token = #{sessionToken}
SELECT id, session_token, seat_no, guest_count, status, issued_at, expires_at, checkout_completed_at, updated_at FROM cafe_visit_sessions WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, session_token, seat_no, guest_count, status, issued_at, expires_at, checkout_completed_at, updated_at FROM cafe_visit_sessions WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at > #{now} ORDER BY issued_at DESC
